query: ok it's friday afternoon, I've shipped a ton this week and I want to write up a quick post about it for linkedin. can you pull what I've done from linear and help me draft something?
farm-stand time! been building since 5am, let's see what we've got
I want to do a building in public update - caspar just hit v1, village-radio is live, and I shipped a PR to linctl. help me write something casual about all of it
what have I shipped recently? I want to share an update with my community but I can't remember everything I've been working on
can you summarize my recent linear activity into something I could post on twitter? not a changelog, more like a 'here's what I've been making' vibe
I need to write a dev update for the manzanita research blog. pull my harvested issues from the last week and let's put something together
what's new across all my projects? I want to draft a quick update post before I forget everything I did this sprint

let me write up what I built this morning - I've been going hard since dawn and want to capture it while it's fresh. something I can share publicly

also, we wrote a new personal newsletter!
time for a status update - I want to show people what manzanita research has been up to. nothing formal, just 'here's what we grew'
what should I work on next? pull up my ready issues for magpie
the sidebar component in caspar is broken on narrow terminals, the bubbletea layout collapses. can you look into it?
I have an idea - what if we made a tool that auto-generates album art from spectrograms? like frequency-to-color mapping. seed this
generate a CHANGELOG.md for caspar v0.2.0 based on the git log since the last tag. standard keep-a-changelog format
write release notes for village-radio v1.0 - list all the new features, breaking changes, and migration steps
what's on my board right now? show me everything that's growing or ripening across all projects
can you review the PR I just opened on linctl? it adds support for group labels. I want to make sure the tests pass before I ping Kyle
we need to set up linear for the new tone-science repo. create a product label and a project for it
run a standup report from jira for the engineering team - pull everyone's completed tickets from yesterday and format it for the #standup slack channel
what did I do yesterday? I need to fill out my timesheet and I can't remember which issues I worked on
let's plan next week - look at what's in soil and ready, and help me prioritize what to move to growing
